creator: huntting@glarp.com
text:
> thank you for the patch!
> Unfortunately I can not test it here, because I lack necessary hardware.
> Since the change is not FreeBSD-specific, could you please first try submitting
> this patch upstream (to memtest86.org)?
> Please update this PR with status of your communication with the upstream developers.
> We will then work from that.

www.memtest86.org is just an ad front.

http://www.memtest.org/ directs patches and bug fixes to
memtest@memtest.org (which bounces) and to the 'memtest86+ forum'
which, dispite it's claims requires a login to post.
